package rulecoverage

func PositiveBytesIndexNotMinusOneContains() string {
    ruleID := "bytes_index_not_minus_one_contains"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`bytes.Index(...) != -1` presence checks instead of `bytes.Contains(...)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
